manifest.name: SVG Canvas Editor

name: SVG Canvas Editor

releases.author: sunxiaoqiqi
releases.description:
Automated review fix release.

- Removes redundant directory name from manifest description.
- Removes unreachable authorUrl.
- Removes builtin-modules dependency.
- Removes CSS !important usage.

releases.author: sunxiaoqiqi
releases.description:
Initial release of SVG Canvas Editor.

Highlights:
- Open and edit SVG files.
- Source, layers, canvas, and inspector panes.
- Chinese/English UI.
- Canvas selection, dragging, resizing, and multi-select dragging.
- Insert text, rectangle, and circle elements.
- Inline text editing.
- Undo/redo/save with one-time .svg.bak backup.
- No network requests.
